Shauna Bannon v Nicolle Caliari Betting & Odds

If you have a hunch about the outcome of the fixture between Shauna Bannon and Nicolle Caliari, have a punt on it! We have odds on 1 different popular markets for Shauna Bannon v Nicolle Caliari.

Where can I bet on Shauna Bannon v Nicolle Caliari?

Bet on the Mixed Martial Arts fixture between Shauna Bannon and Nicolle Caliari, which starts on Saturday, 16 May, at 21:10.

How much could I win by betting on Shauna Bannon v Nicolle Caliari?

If you bet £10 on Shauna Bannon to beat Nicolle Caliari at the current odds of 2.75, you would win £27.5. On the other hand, if you bet £10 on Nicolle Caliari to beat Shauna Bannon at the current odds of 1.44, you would win £14.4.
